steps.title: Use the relocation clue
steps.content: The newspaper report described high salaries and easy fortunes in California during the Gold Rush. The sentence says this report inspired readers to relocate, so the blank needs a verb meaning encouraged or prompted migration.

steps.title: Reject opposite meanings
steps.content:
• Choice B means gave or assigned, which does not fit migration.
  • Choice C means resisted, contradicting the idea that the newspaper inspired readers to move.
  • Choice D means ignored, but the publication printed material that encouraged relocation.
The remaining choice means encouraged or set in motion. The answer is A.
